title: Antstone2898's mod list
description: This is Antstone2898's normal mod list.
body:
My normal Mods

The mods Antstone uses normally.
Including Simple Voice chat, Audioplayer(custom music disks and horns), Litematica, and much more.

This Modpack contains [Redstone tools 1.20.4](https://github.com/RedstoneTools/redstonetools-mod/releases)

Some texture packs are from [vanillatweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net/)

This Modpack contains [bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)

This Modpack contains [Fresh-Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
